tasks.label: 🎯 Complete System Capability Derivation Implementation
args: Implementation Plan: Transform ATP steps into structured system capabilities using A-N taxonomy

tasks.label: Phase 1: Core Infrastructure
args: Phase 1: Building taxonomy models and core data structures

tasks.label: 1.1: Create SystemRequirementTaxonomy Model
args: Create MVVM/Models/SystemRequirementTaxonomy.cs with A-N categories

tasks.label: 1.2: Add Capability Derivation Models
args: Create DerivedCapability, DerivationResult, CapabilityAllocation models

tasks.label: 1.3: Extend Requirement Models
args: Add provenance tracking (ATP-derived vs extracted) to Requirement model

tasks.label: 1.4: Create Training Data Models
args: TrainingExample, ValidationResult, SyntheticDataset models

tasks.label: Phase 2: Derivation Engine
args: Phase 2: Core LLM-based capability derivation logic

tasks.label: 2.1: Create SystemCapabilityDerivationService
args: Services/SystemCapabilityDerivationService.cs - main derivation engine

tasks.label: 2.2: Add ATP Step Parser
args: Services/ATPStepParser.cs - extract test steps from procedures

tasks.label: 2.3: Implement Derivation Prompts
args: Prompts/CapabilityDerivationPromptBuilder.cs with A-N taxonomy

tasks.label: 2.4: Add Taxonomy Validation
args: Services/TaxonomyValidator.cs - validate category assignments

tasks.label: 2.5: Create Capability Allocator
args: Services/CapabilityAllocator.cs - assign to subsystems

tasks.label: Phase 3: Training Data Pipeline
args: Phase 3: Synthetic training data generation and validation

tasks.label: 3.1: Create SyntheticTrainingDataGenerator
args: Services/SyntheticTrainingDataGenerator.cs - generate ATP+derivation pairs

tasks.label: 3.2: Add Training Data Validation UI
args: MVVM domain for human validation of synthetic examples

tasks.label: 3.3: Implement Quality Scoring
args: Services/DerivationQualityScorer.cs - self-evaluation metrics

tasks.label: 3.4: Create Prompt Refinement Loop
args: Services/PromptRefinementEngine.cs - improve based on corrections

tasks.label: Phase 4: Integration & Validation
args: Phase 4: Integrate with existing services and add validation

tasks.label: 4.1: Extend SmartRequirementImporter
args: Add ATP derivation mode to existing SmartRequirementImporter

tasks.label: 4.2: Update Jama Integration
args: Extend JamaAllDataDocxParser to detect ATP sections

tasks.label: 4.3: Add Gap Analysis Service
args: Services/RequirementGapAnalyzer.cs - compare derived vs existing

tasks.label: 4.4: Extend RequirementAnalysisService
args: Add derivation analysis to existing RequirementAnalysisService

tasks.label: 4.5: Update DI Configuration
args: Update App.xaml.cs with new service registrations

tasks.label: Phase 5: Testing & Deployment
args: Phase 5: Comprehensive testing and production deployment

tasks.label: 5.1: Create Unit Tests
args: Test coverage for all new services and models

tasks.label: 5.2: Add Integration Tests
args: End-to-end ATP → derivation → Jama sync testing

tasks.label: 5.3: Performance Validation
args: Bulk processing performance, LLM response times, memory usage

tasks.label: 5.4: User Acceptance Testing
args: Domain expert validation of derivation quality and workflow

tasks.label: 5.5: Documentation & Training
args: User guides, architectural documentation, training materials

tasks.label: Phase 6: Template Forms & Self-Auditing
args: Phase 6: Implement structured form templates and LLM self-auditing for enterprise reliability

tasks.label: 6.1: Design Template Form Architecture
args: Create Services/Templates/ with FormField, FieldCriticality, ValidationRule models

tasks.label: 6.2: Implement Hard/Soft Constraint System
args: Add FieldConstraintType (HardReject/SoftRetry/FlagOnly) for graceful degradation

tasks.label: 6.3: Build Template Form Service
args: Services/Templates/CapabilityDerivationTemplateService.cs with form generation & parsing

tasks.label: 6.4: Create Self-Auditing Engine
args: Services/Templates/SelfAuditingTemplateService.cs for two-phase generate+audit

tasks.label: 6.5: Add Field-Level Performance Metrics
args: Track retry rates, confidence patterns, failure modes per field type

tasks.label: 6.6: Implement Deterministic Output Envelopes
args: Pre-generated JSON shells - LLM only fills values, cannot modify structure

tasks.label: 6.7: Integrate with SystemCapabilityDerivationService
args: Migrate from JSON parsing to template forms in existing derivation service

tasks.label: 6.8: Build Compliance Wrapper Interface
args: Treat LLM as engineered system component with contract, validation, telemetry

tasks.label: 6.9: Create A/B Testing Framework
args: Compare template forms vs JSON parsing with real data and metrics

tasks.label: 6.10: Add Telemetry & Dashboard Integration
args: Enterprise monitoring, field completion rates, confidence calibration metrics
